item.title: 1320. Cpp 中 Leetcode 解决方案 | 1320. Leetcode Solution in Cpp
item.description:
发表于一旦暂停，chiki1601 将无法评论或发布帖子，直到他们的暂停被解除。

一旦解除暂停，chiki1601 将能够再次发表评论和发布帖子。

一旦取消发布，chiki1601 的所有帖子都将被隐藏，只有他们自己可以访问。

如果 chiki1601 没有被暂停，他们仍然可以从他们的仪表板重新发布他们的帖子。



原文:

Miss Pooja Anilkumar Patel

Posted on Jul 3 

class Solution {
    int d(int a, int b) {
        return abs(a / 6 - b / 6) + abs(a % 6 - b % 6);
    }
public:
    int minimumDistance(string word) {
        vector<int> dp(26);
        int res = 0, save = 0, n = word.size();
        for (int i = 0; i < n - 1; ++i) {
            int b = word[i] - 'A', c = word[i + 1] - 'A';
            for (int a = 0; a < 26; ++a)
                dp[b] = max(dp[b], dp[a] + d(b, c) - d(a, c));
            save = max(save, dp[b]);
            res += d(b, c);
        }
        return res - save;
    }
};

Once suspended, chiki1601 will not be able to comment or publish posts until their suspension is removed.

Once unsuspended, chiki1601 will be able to comment and publish posts again.

Once unpublished, all posts by chiki1601 will become hidden and only accessible to themselves.

If chiki1601 is not suspended, they can still re-publish their posts from their dashboard.
item.author: chiki1601

item.title: 1284. Cpp 中 Leetcode 的解决方案 | 1284. Leetcode Solution in Cpp
item.description:
发表于一旦暂停，chiki1601 将无法评论或发布帖子，直到他们的暂停被解除。

一旦解除暂停，chiki1601 将能够再次发表评论和发布帖子。

一旦取消发布，chiki1601 的所有帖子都将被隐藏，只有他们自己可以访问。

如果 chiki1601 没有被暂停，他们仍然可以从他们的仪表板重新发布他们的帖子。



原文:

Miss Pooja Anilkumar Patel

Posted on Jul 3 

// Time: O(MN * 2^(MN))
// Space: O(2^(MN))
class Solution {
public:
    int minFlips(vector<vector<int>>& A) {
        int start = 0, M = A.size(), N = A[0].size(), step = 0, dirs[5] = {1,0,-1,0,1};
        for (int i = 0; i < M; ++i) {
            for (int j = 0; j < N; ++j) {
                start |= (A[i][j] << (i * 3 + j));
            }
        }
        queue<int> q;
        unordered_set<int> s;
        q.push(start);
        s.insert(start);
        while (q.size()) {
            int cnt = q.size();
            while (cnt--) {
                int state = q.front();
                q.pop();
                if (state == 0) return step;
                for (int i = 0; i < 9; ++i) {
                    int next = state, r = i / 3, c = i % 3;
                    next ^= (1 << (r * 3 + c));
                    for (int j = 0; j < 4; ++j) {
                        int x = r + dirs[j], y = c + dirs[j + 1];
                        if (x < 0 || x >= M || y < 0 || y >= N) continue;
                        next ^= (1 << (x * 3 + y));
                    }
                    if (s.count(next) == 0) {
                        q.push(next);
                        s.insert(next);
                    }
                }
            }
            ++step;
        }
        return -1;
    }
};

Shivaansh Agarwal - Jul 3

Once suspended, chiki1601 will not be able to comment or publish posts until their suspension is removed.

Once unsuspended, chiki1601 will be able to comment and publish posts again.

Once unpublished, all posts by chiki1601 will become hidden and only accessible to themselves.

If chiki1601 is not suspended, they can still re-publish their posts from their dashboard.

item.title: 1269. CPP 中 Leetcode 解决方案 | 1269. Leetcode Solution in CPP
item.description:
发表于克里斯蒂安·费尔南多—— 拉吉·南丹·夏尔马 - 一旦暂停，chiki1601 将无法评论或发布帖子，直到他们的暂停被解除。

一旦解除暂停，chiki1601 将能够再次发表评论和发布帖子。

一旦取消发布，chiki1601 的所有帖子都将被隐藏，只有他们自己可以访问。

如果 chiki1601 没有被暂停，他们仍然可以从他们的仪表板重新发布他们的帖子。



原文:

Miss Pooja Anilkumar Patel

Posted on Jul 3 

class Solution {
 public:
  int numWays(int steps, int arrLen) {
    constexpr int kMod = 1e9 + 7;
    const int n = min(arrLen, steps / 2 + 1);
    // dp[i] := # of ways to stay on index i
    vector<long> dp(n);
    dp[0] = 1;

    while (steps--) {
      vector<long> newDp(n);
      for (int i = 0; i < n; ++i) {
        newDp[i] = dp[i];
        if (i - 1 >= 0)
          newDp[i] += dp[i - 1];
        if (i + 1 < n)
          newDp[i] += dp[i + 1];
        newDp[i] %= kMod;
      }
      dp = move(newDp);
    }

    return dp[0];
  }
};

Cristian Fernando - Jul 2

Raj Nandan Sharma - Jul 3

Once suspended, chiki1601 will not be able to comment or publish posts until their suspension is removed.

Once unsuspended, chiki1601 will be able to comment and publish posts again.

Once unpublished, all posts by chiki1601 will become hidden and only accessible to themselves.

item.title: 1289. Cpp 中 Leetcode 的解决方案 | 1289. Leetcode Solution in Cpp
item.description:
发表于一旦暂停，chiki1601 将无法评论或发布帖子，直到他们的暂停被解除。

一旦解除暂停，chiki1601 将能够再次发表评论和发布帖子。

一旦取消发布，chiki1601 的所有帖子都将被隐藏，只有他们自己可以访问。

如果 chiki1601 没有被暂停，他们仍然可以从他们的仪表板重新发布他们的帖子。



原文:

Miss Pooja Anilkumar Patel

Posted on Jul 3 

class Solution {
 public:
  int minFallingPathSum(vector<vector<int>>& grid) {
    const int n = grid.size();

    for (int i = 1; i < n; ++i) {
      const auto twoMinNumAndIndexs = getTwoMinNumAndIndexs(grid[i - 1]);
      const auto& [firstMinNum, firstMinIndex] = twoMinNumAndIndexs[0];
      const auto& [secondMinNum, _] = twoMinNumAndIndexs[1];
      for (int j = 0; j < n; ++j)
        if (j == firstMinIndex)
          grid[i][j] += secondMinNum;
        else
          grid[i][j] += firstMinNum;
    }

    return *min_element(begin(grid.back()), end(grid.back()));
  }

 private:
  vector<pair<int, int>> getTwoMinNumAndIndexs(const vector<int>& A) {
    vector<pair<int, int>> numAndIndexs;

    for (int i = 0; i < A.size(); ++i)
      numAndIndexs.emplace_back(A[i], i);

    sort(begin(numAndIndexs), end(numAndIndexs));
    return {numAndIndexs[0], numAndIndexs[1]};
  }
};

Once suspended, chiki1601 will not be able to comment or publish posts until their suspension is removed.

Once unsuspended, chiki1601 will be able to comment and publish posts again.

Once unpublished, all posts by chiki1601 will become hidden and only accessible to themselves.

item.author: chiki1601

item.title: 1263. Cpp 中 Leetcode 解决方案 | 1263. Leetcode Solution in Cpp
item.description:
发表于一旦暂停，chiki1601 将无法评论或发布帖子，直到他们的暂停被解除。

一旦解除暂停，chiki1601 将能够再次发表评论和发布帖子。

一旦取消发布，chiki1601 的所有帖子都将被隐藏，只有他们自己可以访问。

如果 chiki1601 没有被暂停，他们仍然可以从他们的仪表板重新发布他们的帖子。



原文:

Miss Pooja Anilkumar Patel

Posted on Jul 3 


// Time: O((MN)^2)
// Space: O((MN)^2)
class Solution {
public:
    int minPushBox(vector<vector<char>>& G) {
        int dp[20][20][20][20] = {}, M = G.size(), N = G[0].size(), sx, sy, bx, by, tx, ty, dirs[4][2] = { {0,1},{0,-1},{1,0},{-1,0} }, ans = INT_MAX;
        memset(dp, 0x3f, sizeof(dp));
        for (int i = 0; i < M; ++i) {
            for (int j = 0; j < N; ++j) {
                if (G[i][j] == 'S') sx = i, sy = j;
                else if (G[i][j] == 'B') bx = i, by = j;
                else if (G[i][j] == 'T') tx = i, ty = j;
            }
        }
        queue<vector<int>> q;
        q.push({ sx, sy, bx, by, 0 });
        dp[sx][sy][bx][by] = 0;
        while (q.size()) {
            auto v = q.front();
            q.pop();
            int sx = v[0], sy = v[1], bx = v[2], by = v[3], push = v[4];
            if (bx == tx && by == ty) ans = min(ans, push);
            for (auto [dx, dy] : dirs) {
                int x = sx + dx, y = sy + dy;
                if (x < 0 || y < 0 || x >= M || y >= N || G[x][y] == '#') continue;
                int bx2 = bx, by2 = by, push2 = push;
                if (x == bx && y == by) bx2 += dx, by2 += dy, ++push2;
                if (bx2 < 0 || by2 < 0 || bx2 >= M || by2 >= N || G[bx2][by2] == '#' || push2 >= dp[x][y][bx2][by2]) continue;
                dp[x][y][bx2][by2] = push2;
                q.push({ x, y, bx2, by2, push2 });
            }
        }
        return ans == INT_MAX ? -1 : ans;
    }
};

Once suspended, chiki1601 will not be able to comment or publish posts until their suspension is removed.

Once unsuspended, chiki1601 will be able to comment and publish posts again.

Once unpublished, all posts by chiki1601 will become hidden and only accessible to themselves.

If chiki1601 is not suspended, they can still re-publish their posts from their dashboard.

item.title: 1349. Cpp 中 Leetcode 解决方案 | 1349. Leetcode Solution in Cpp
item.description:
发表于一旦暂停，chiki1601 将无法评论或发布帖子，直到他们的暂停被解除。

一旦解除暂停，chiki1601 将能够再次发表评论和发布帖子。

一旦取消发布，chiki1601 的所有帖子都将被隐藏，只有他们自己可以访问。

如果 chiki1601 没有被暂停，他们仍然可以从他们的仪表板重新发布他们的帖子。



原文:

Miss Pooja Anilkumar Patel

Posted on Jul 3 

class Solution {
 public:
  int maxStudents(vector<vector<char>>& seats) {
    return accumulate(begin(seats), end(seats), 0,
                      [&](int a, const auto& seat) {
                        return a + count(begin(seat), end(seat), '.');
                      }) -
           hungarian(seats);
  }

 private:
  const vector<pair<int, int>> dirs{{-1, -1}, {0, -1}, {1, -1},
                                    {-1, 1},  {0, 1},  {1, 1}};

  int hungarian(const vector<vector<char>>& seats) {
    const int m = seats.size();
    const int n = seats[0].size();
    int count = 0;
    vector<vector<int>> seen(m, vector<int>(n));
    vector<vector<int>> match(m, vector<int>(n, -1));

    for (int i = 0; i < m; ++i)
      for (int j = 0; j < n; ++j)
        if (seats[i][j] == '.' && match[i][j] == -1) {
          const int sessionId = i * n + j;
          seen[i][j] = sessionId;
          count += dfs(seats, i, j, sessionId, seen, match);
        }

    return count;
  }

  int dfs(const vector<vector<char>>& seats, int i, int j, int sessionId,
          vector<vector<int>>& seen, vector<vector<int>>& match) {
    const int m = seats.size();
    const int n = seats[0].size();

    for (const auto& [dx, dy] : dirs) {
      const int x = i + dx;
      const int y = j + dy;
      if (x < 0 || x == m || y < 0 || y == n)
        continue;
      if (seats[x][y] != '.' || seen[x][y] == sessionId)
        continue;
      seen[x][y] = sessionId;
      if (match[x][y] == -1 || dfs(seats, match[x][y] / n, match[x][y] % n,
                                   sessionId, seen, match)) {
        match[x][y] = i * n + j;
        match[i][j] = x * n + y;
        return 1;
      }
    }

    return 0;
  }
};

Once suspended, chiki1601 will not be able to comment or publish posts until their suspension is removed.

Once unsuspended, chiki1601 will be able to comment and publish posts again.

Once unpublished, all posts by chiki1601 will become hidden and only accessible to themselves.

If chiki1601 is not suspended, they can still re-publish their posts from their dashboard.

item.title: 1359. Cpp 中的 Leetcode 解决方案 | 1359. Leetcode Soluiton in Cpp
item.description:
发表于一旦暂停，chiki1601 将无法评论或发布帖子，直到他们的暂停被解除。

一旦解除暂停，chiki1601 将能够再次发表评论和发布帖子。

一旦取消发布，chiki1601 的所有帖子都将被隐藏，只有他们自己可以访问。

如果 chiki1601 没有被暂停，他们仍然可以从他们的仪表板重新发布他们的帖子。



原文:

Miss Pooja Anilkumar Patel

Posted on Jul 3 

class Solution {
 public:
  int countOrders(int n) {
    constexpr int kMod = 1e9 + 7;
    long ans = 1;

    for (int i = 1; i <= n; ++i)
      ans = ans * i * (i * 2 - 1) % kMod;

    return ans;
  }
};

Once suspended, chiki1601 will not be able to comment or publish posts until their suspension is removed.

Once unsuspended, chiki1601 will be able to comment and publish posts again.
